meta.title: My Home
meta.description: Learn vocabulary about rooms and objects in a home.
meta.description_ko: 집의 방과 물건에 관한 어휘를 학습합니다.

explanation.en: A 'bedroom' is the room where you sleep.
These are the main rooms in a house.
We cook food in the 'kitchen'.

questions.prompt: My _____ is very big. We have a sofa and a TV. (우리 거실은 매우 큽니다. 소파와 TV가 있습니다.)

explanation.en: The 'living room' is where the family relaxes together, usually with a sofa and TV.
explanation.ko: 'living room'은 소파와 TV가 있는 가족이 함께 쉬는 거실입니다.

explanation.en: 'My house has + number + rooms' describes the size of a home.
explanation.ko: 'My house has + 숫자 + rooms'으로 집의 크기를 설명합니다.

explanation.en: A 'sofa' is a large comfortable seat usually found in the living room.
explanation.ko: 'sofa'는 일반적으로 거실에 있는 큰 편안한 의자입니다.

explanation.en: A 'refrigerator' (fridge) is a kitchen appliance that keeps food cold.
These are common objects found in a home.
explanation.ko: 집에서 흔히 볼 수 있는 물건들입니다.

questions.prompt: I brush my teeth in the _____. (나는 욕실에서 이를 닦습니다.)

explanation.en: We brush our teeth in the 'bathroom'.
'Stairs' are a series of steps that connect different floors of a building.

questions.answer: The cat is on the sofa.

explanation.en: 'On the sofa' means the cat is resting on top of the sofa.
explanation.ko: 'on the sofa'는 고양이가 소파 위에 있다는 뜻입니다.

explanation.en: A 'garage' is a room or building where cars are kept.
'Soap' is a cleaning product, not furniture.

questions.prompt: Please _____ the door. It's cold outside. (문을 닫아 주세요. 밖이 춥습니다.)

explanation.en: 'Close the door' means to shut the door.

questions.prompt: 'I live in a house.'와 'I live in an apartment.'의 차이는?

explanation.en: A 'house' is a standalone building; an 'apartment' is a unit in a larger building.
explanation.ko: 'house'는 단독주택이고, 'apartment'는 큰 건물 안의 하나의 단위인 아파트입니다.

questions.answer: My bedroom is on the second floor.

explanation.en: 'On the + ordinal number + floor' describes which floor something is on.
explanation.ko: 'on the + 서수 + floor'로 몇 층에 있는지 표현합니다.

explanation.en: The opposite of 'clean' is 'dirty'.

questions.prompt: 다음 문장에서 틀린 부분을 찾으세요: 'My house have three bedrooms.'

explanation.en: 'My house' is third person singular, so we use 'has', not 'have'.
'Curtains' are pieces of cloth that hang in front of windows.

questions.prompt: We eat meals in the _____. (우리는 식당/다이닝룸에서 식사를 합니다.)

explanation.en: The 'dining room' is where meals are eaten.
A 'garden' is an outdoor area where plants and flowers grow.
explanation.ko: 'garden'은 식물과 꽃이 자라는 야외 공간인 정원입니다.

questions.answer: I clean my room on Sundays.

explanation.en: 'Clean my room' means to tidy up your bedroom.
A 'mirror' is commonly found in a bathroom or bedroom.
explanation.ko: 'mirror'(거울)는 주로 욕실이나 침실에서 볼 수 있습니다.

questions.prompt: 다음 중 'kitchen appliance(부엌 가전)'이 아닌 것은?

explanation.en: A 'sofa' is living room furniture, not a kitchen appliance.

questions.prompt: 다음 대화의 빈칸에 알맞은 것은? 'A: Where do you sleep? B: In my _____.'

explanation.en: We sleep in the 'bedroom'.
